select_group.title: Select Group
select_group.description: Choose the Spond group whose events you want as a calendar.

data.include_planned: Include planned events (not yet open for responses)
data.show_unanswered_indicator: Mark unanswered invites in the calendar
data.unanswered_require_all: Only mark unanswered when every represented member is unanswered
data.hide_declined_require_all: Only hide when every represented member has declined

data_description.unanswered_prefix: Text prepended to the event title when you have an open, unanswered invite
data_description.unanswered_require_all: If you represent multiple members (yourself and/or children you are a guardian for), enable to require all of them to be unanswered before marking. When off, a single unanswered member is enough.
data_description.hide_declined_require_all: If you represent multiple members, enable to require all of them to have declined before hiding. When off, a single decline is enough to hide the event.
data_description.strip_emoji: Removes emoji characters from the Spond event title for a cleaner calendar text. The unanswered-prefix above is kept as-is.
data_description.strip_description_emoji: Removes emoji characters from the Spond event description for a cleaner calendar text.
data_description.use_meetup_time_as_description: When the event has a meet-up time set, replace the event description with a short note about when to show up (in Norwegian). Events without a valid meet-up time will get no description.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Spond. Check your credentials.
error.no_groups: No groups found for this account.
